description: SendCanary BIMI setup: publishes a BIMI TXT record so your verified brand logo appears next to authenticated emails in Gmail, Apple Mail, Yahoo, and other BIMI-aware inboxes. BIMI requires DMARC at quarantine or reject; set that up first via SendCanary's DMARC template. SendCanary (https://sendcanary.com) is an email authentication platform that monitors DMARC reports, detects spoofing, and automates DNS remediation for domain owners.
variableDescription: logo_url: Public HTTPS URL to your trademark-verified SVG logo (BIMI SVG-P/S format). Typical value: https://brand.example.com/bimi-logo.svg
